subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-05-20
subcodes.first_line: Some people are like unto the children. The most unimportant event gives them happiness and the most trifling incident saddens their hearts. For example, if you give one Franc to a child
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکثر نفوس مانند اطفالند بامور جزئیه محزون یا مسرُور بشوند اما امور عظیمه را اهمیت نمید‌هند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @differences in human capacity, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
